1747470.name: Road Diner Simulator
1747470.description:
Start as a simple cook and rise to a diner owner. Build meaningful connections through the food you serve and turn them into a thriving business.

Cook. Serve. Connect. Manage. Expand. Decorate.



Your customers come first.

Seat guests, take orders, serve dishes, and clean tables. Keep the service smooth and efficient, especially during rush hours. Not all customers are equal, though. Some may be more influential than others.

Cook from dozens of recipes, from scrambled eggs and juicy burgers to fried specialities. Test your skills and let customers judge your food. If they love it, they’ll return. If not… they won’t be shy about it. And watch out, some guests are seriously demanding.

In Road Diner, relationships matter.

Great food and excellent service win hearts and open doors. Regular customers can become more than just guests. The better you treat them, the more willing they’ll be to share their contacts, unlock new opportunities, and shape the direction of your business.

Earn enough trust, and some of them might even join your team.


A diner doesn’t run on good food alone.

Hire employees, assign tasks, and keep operations running smoothly, especially when the place is packed. Every staff member has a unique personality and skill set, so putting the right person in the right position is crucial.

Handle finances carefully. Pay bills, keep an eye on your stock and menu selection, negotiate deals, and manage salaries. Smart budgeting and calculated risks will determine whether your diner survives… or thrives.

Grow your diner at your own pace.

Choose from different building sizes and layouts to match your ambitions. Decide how much traffic you’re ready to handle.

Unlock new recipes, invest in additional cooking stations, and gain access to upgraded equipment and services. Expansion brings new possibilities and new challenges.

Create a space that reflects your vision.

Design the interior, arrange tables, decorate walls and floors, and define the atmosphere. Will your diner cater to busy office workers, late-night travelers, or a more unconventional crowd?

The style is yours to choose.
1747470.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 波兰语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 俄语, 简体中文, 土耳其语, 乌克兰语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
